verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In His wounding He thought of my transgressions As He was being bruised, He thought of my iniquities When He was being chastised He thought of my peace as He took those stripes, of every sickness that could afflict me For in His dying, He had in mind Making provisions for my entire earthly life He thought of everything He thought of everything (Absolutely everything) He knew I'd ever need.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Before the foundation of the world T'was settled in the mind of God that He would Be the perfect sacrifice to atone for all mankind In God's thoughts the work's already done Creation was made to reveal His redemption His perfect plan was to make His love known unto man.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When it seems the enemy is after me I see him drowning in the Red Sea God destroyed my enemy Should sickness try to afflict this body I see Christ lifted up on Calvary's tree Healing paid for me For any condition and soul, body, spirit Forever settled in heaven, is God's eternal word It all comes down completeness to the Of His redemptive work.
